title: RBQ Contractor Check + Booking
tagline: Verify RBQ licence then book licensed Montreal renovators for spring season.

jtbd.situation: When hiring a contractor for spring renovation after residential strike delays
jtbd.persona: Rosemont homeowner burned by unlicensed Kijiji contractor
jtbd.motivation: verify RBQ licence and book vetted contractor with deposit
jtbd.outcome: complete renovation with financial guarantee protection
jtbd.statement: When hiring a spring renovator, a Rosemont homeowner wants RBQ verification and booking so they avoid unlicensed contractors.

montrealAngle: RBQ registry is public but UX-poor; CCQ forecasts 16K worker shortage 2025-29; Montreal key region. Residential strike May 2025 increased homeowner anxiety.
whyNow: Spring construction season + RBQ processing delays (regular apps from Feb 2026 per RBQ site).

persona.name: Montreal Island homeowner, $5-30K renovation
persona.countSource: [hypothesis] Montreal Island homeowners doing annual renovations

competitors.name: Aidiway
competitors.notes: Broad home services; RBQ verification not core wedge.

mvpScope.coreJob: Lookup RBQ licence number and request quote from pre-vetted contractors
mvpScope.conciergeFallback: Manual RBQ check + email intro to contractor

businessModel.pricingCAD: $29 lead fee to contractor or 5% deposit

g1_montrealAnchor.notes: RBQ is Quebec-wide but Montreal renovation volume highest.

g5_legal.notes: Contractors must hold RBQ licence; platform doesn't perform work.
